title: Monsoon Menu Post
ask: One static post for the new adrak chai. Make it feel like rain. But happy rain. Sunny rain. Rain you would pay 40 rupees to stand in.

title: Steel That Lasts
ask: Static post for the new tiffin range. Tagline: 'Outlives your job, your phone, and possibly you.' Uncle ji loved it, do not change it.
finePrint: Owner wants his late father's photo in the corner. Tastefully. But big.

title: 10 Minute Banner
ask: Homepage banner for the monsoon sale. Onions, umbrellas, urgency.
finePrint: Needs to be delivered in 10 minutes. The banner, not the groceries. Ha ha. But seriously, today.

title: Protein Paratha Launch
ask: Launch reel for the 32g protein paratha. Sizzle, steam, slow-mo ghee. Founder will appear, uninvited but inevitable.
finePrint: Do not crop the biceps. The biceps are brand equity.

title: Fixed Deposit Carousel
ask: Explain FD rates to Gen Z. Make compounding feel like a glow-up. No slang older than this quarter.
finePrint: Legal must approve every word. Legal is on leave till Thursday. Deadline is Wednesday.

title: Glow Serum Teaser
ask: Teaser static for the new serum. One drop, one face, one feeling. The feeling is 'inner light', per the brand book, page 12.
finePrint: Do not use the word fairness. Marketing says the vibe is 'inner light'. Legal says the vibe is 'careful'.

title: Sunday Curry Post
ask: Static post: Sunday curry, family table, masala packet placed naturally in the centre of everything, like it pays rent.
finePrint: The chilli red must match the founder's Mercedes. He will check. He has the car key as reference.

title: UPI Cashback Story Set
ask: Three story frames for the weekend cashback. Tap, pay, confetti. Standard dopamine.

title: Saree Drape Tutorial
ask: Edit a 4-minute drape tutorial into 45 seconds without losing any of the 9 steps or the model's dignity.
finePrint: Model's mother will be on set. She has opinions and a thermos.

title: Drop Day Teaser
ask: Teaser for Friday's hoodie drop using whatever meme format is alive this exact week. Check the date. Check it again.
finePrint: Must use a meme format from this week. Last week's memes are for LinkedIn.

title: Sky Villa Post
ask: Static for the new Sky Villas. The flat is 2BHK. The feeling should be 4BHK. The price should be invisible.
finePrint: Flat must look bigger than it is. This is not lying, this is wide angle.

title: Polki Earrings Post
ask: Single product post for the new polki earrings. Heritage, but make the heritage scroll-stopping.
finePrint: Gold must look expensive but approachable. Royal but humble. You get it. They are sure you get it.

title: Chai vs Coffee War
ask: Snarky carousel roasting coffee culture. Punch hard, but remember who actually buys our croissants.
finePrint: Roast coffee drinkers without alienating coffee drinkers. They are 60 percent of walk-ins.

title: Midnight Cravings Reel
ask: Fast-cut reel about 2 AM cravings. The CEO saw a competitor version at 2 AM. He wants 'that'. He cannot find the link. Nobody can find the link.
finePrint: Cuts must land exactly on the beat. The CEO claps along while reviewing.

title: Home Loan Film Cutdown
ask: Cut the 90-second home loan film to 15 seconds. Keep the emotion, the family, the dog, and all of compliance.
finePrint: All 14 disclaimers stay in.
Compliance wants every disclaimer readable. At 15 seconds. They have a stopwatch.

title: Before After Without Before
ask: Campaign static showing transformation. ASCI rules say no before-after claims. Client wants the before-after feeling. Without the before. Or the after.
finePrint: No claims, no arrows, no split screens. But the consumer should 'just know'.

title: Diwali Early Bird Teaser
ask: Diwali teaser. Yes, it is months away. The son read a case study about 'owning the festive conversation early' and now we are all living in it.
finePrint: Must feel festive but not so festive that people check their calendar.

title: Cheat Day Apology Post
ask: The founder posted a pizza story from his personal account. Turn this crisis into content. The pizza must become a teachable moment.
finePrint: Tone: accountable but shredded.

title: Bridal Campaign Key Visual
ask: Key visual for the bridal campaign. One bride, one necklace, one thousand-yard stare of generational wealth.
finePrint: Bride should look emotional but not sad. Tears of joy at roughly 30 percent opacity.
Every jewel must be in focus. All 47. Madam ji will zoom.

title: Founder Thought Leadership Reel
ask: Make the founder sound like he predicted UPI. Available footage: him reading bullet points off his phone in a hallway.
finePrint: He should look like he is NOT reading. He is reading.

title: Drone Walkthrough Edit
ask: Aerial walkthrough of the new tower. Note: no drone was hired. You have phone footage shot from the 14th floor of the building opposite.
finePrint: Make the phone footage fly. Stabilise until it believes it is a drone.

title: Roast Our Own Brand
ask: Self-roast carousel. We make fun of our own prices, our own drops, our own founder. He approved this. He will also take it personally.
finePrint: Self-aware but not too self-aware. Cool self-aware. He will know the difference.

title: Raksha Bandhan Catalogue Post
ask: Festive catalogue post. 18 sarees. One post. The owner does not trust carousels, swiping, or the concept of 'less'.
finePrint: All 18 sarees equally visible. No saree should feel less loved.

title: 50 Years Of Bartan Film
ask: Anniversary film. Five decades, one steel dynasty. Archive photos, misty eyes, the hammer.
finePrint: All 23 family members must be featured equally. They are counting seconds.
Uncle ji will narrate. He has done one take. There will be one take.

title: Franchise Pitch Deck
ask: Design the franchise pitch deck. Founder wants it to feel like an Apple keynote. The budget feels like a bus ticket.
finePrint: Slide 14 must contain his quote about chai being 'the original startup'. Full slide. His face behind it.

title: App Update Explainer
ask: 30-second explainer for the new app update. Product team will send final copy. Product team has so far sent four different final copies.
finePrint: Each revision is final. Expect six finals.
The word 'fast' must appear at least five times without feeling repetitive.

title: CSR Tree Plantation Post
ask: Post about the bank's tree plantation drive. Photos show 12 trees and 40 executives. Copy says 10,000 trees. Make the math feel okay.
finePrint: Executives must be cropped out. Except the MD. The MD stays.

title: Influencer Kit Unboxing Template
ask: Design the influencer PR kit template. The box is purple. The brand is pink. The CEO's wife chose the box. The box stays.
finePrint: Purple box, pink brand, and the layout must make this look intentional.
CMO wants 'pink-forward'. The box, again, is purple.

title: Recipe Reel Pilot
ask: Pilot episode of a recipe reel series. Hands, steam, masala falling in slow motion like it owes gravity nothing.
finePrint: Hand model must wear the family rings. Rings arrive Thursday. Shoot is Wednesday.

title: Possession Day Testimonials
ask: Edit resident testimonials into a feel-good film. Residents are genuinely happy and genuinely inaudible.
finePrint: Subtitles should be generous. Interpret with kindness.

title: Viral Or Refund Reel
ask: Drop reel for the new cargo line. Client wants a written guarantee that it goes viral. He says this is standard. It is not standard.
finePrint: If it gets under 100k views, we redo it free. He has said this in three meetings.
He will share it from his personal account 'to help'. Plan for this.

title: Crypto Pivot Announcement
ask: Announce the crypto feature. Update: legal called mid-brief. We are no longer saying crypto. We are saying 'digital assets of the future'. The deadline did not move.
finePrint: The word crypto must not appear. The crypto audience must still understand.
CEO hates orange now. The competitor is orange. Orange is over.

title: Maharani Campaign Film Edit
ask: Edit the Maharani campaign film. The reference is a period drama with a 40 crore budget. We shot in a banquet hall in Andheri with two lights.
finePrint: The royal feel must come from the grading. There is nowhere else for it to come from.
The banquet hall AC vent is visible in 30 percent of shots. It was not royal.

title: War Room Hype Film
ask: Internal hype film for the mega sale. The sale is in six weeks. The film is needed tomorrow 9 AM. The energy, apparently, is needed now.
finePrint: CEO wants the team to cry. Good crying. Sale crying.

title: National TV Spot Cutdown
ask: Cut the national TV spot for social. The spot is 60 seconds. We have rights to 11 seconds of it. The other 49 belong to a music label and a very alert lawyer.
finePrint: Founder wants his cameo extended. His cameo is 0.8 seconds.
The 11 seconds we own do not include the product.

title: Wedding Season Mega Lookbook
ask: Wedding season lookbook shoot edit. The outdoor shoot moved indoors due to rain, budget, and one argument.
finePrint: Make indoors look like Udaipur palace at golden hour. We have one window.
The owner's niece is now a model. The contract model is also still the model. Equal frames.

title: The Apology Post
ask: The app was down for six hours. Write and design the apology post. Apologise without admitting anything happened.
finePrint: Legal forbids the words sorry, outage, down, issue, and 'we'.
Tone: apologetic but premium.

title: Rebrand Reveal
ask: Reveal film for the rebrand. New name: FitTandoor Pro Max. Yes, like the phone. No, we cannot say like the phone.
finePrint: The founder will do a slow walk towards camera. He has been practising.

title: Monsoon Skin SOS Campaign
ask: Six posts. One day. All six must feel handcrafted, unhurried, and artisanal. Again: one day.
finePrint: CMO will review from her treadmill. Keep all text readable at jogging speed.
Each post needs a different mood. The brand book allows two moods.

title: Founder Biopic Teaser
ask: Teaser for a founder biopic. Treat it like a Bollywood trailer. The footage is a shaky 2009 wedding video and four passport photos.
finePrint: The son wants a post-credits scene. For a teaser.
Background score must 'feel like A.R. Rahman without being A.R. Rahman'. Legal was specific.

title: Metaverse Show Flat
ask: The owner heard the metaverse is back. Nobody can confirm this. Build a 'virtual show flat experience' post anyway.
finePrint: The walkthrough must work on his phone. He is testing on a Nokia.
Do not use the word metaverse. He also heard it is over.

title: Mystery Celebrity Collab Drop
ask: Tease the celebrity collab. The celebrity is not confirmed. Design around a silhouette that is recognisable but legally nobody.
finePrint: The silhouette must create speculation but survive a lawsuit.
If the deal falls through, the silhouette becomes 'the spirit of the streets'. Keep that door open.

title: IPO Rumour Management
ask: Posts that neither confirm nor deny the IPO. The vibe, however, should scream IPO. The lawyers should hear nothing.
finePrint: Blue is banned this week. Investor meeting reasons. Last week it was orange.
Every draft goes to three departments. Each department contradicts one other department.

title: Craanes Award Entry Film
ask: Entry film for the Craanes. The campaign did not perform. The film should gently suggest that it did. Jury loves craft. Add craft.
finePrint: Results slide must be 'directionally true'. Their words.
Client wants their logo bigger on OUR award entry.

title: The Super Bowl Of Bartan
ask: Uncle ji watched the Super Bowl. He wants a Super Bowl ad. For steel bartan. He has already cried imagining it. Do not let him down.
finePrint: Budget is the same as the tiffin post. Dream big anyway, beta.
It must make his late father proud. This is in the brief. In writing.
